privileged_info_summary: The search_chemical task uses synthetic test data in the authentic EPCRA Tier II XML format. The data contains chemical inventory information for a fictional facility named Green Valley Water Facility located in Colchester, Vermont. The primary target chemical is Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5), which is classified as an Extremely Hazardous Substance (EHS) under EPCRA Section 302. The facility stores an average of 15,000 pounds and a maximum of 20,000 pounds of Chlorine in a tank inside the chlorination building. The data is imported into CAMEO Data Manager version 4.5.1, an EPA/NOAA tool designed for managing chemical inventory data and emergency planning information. All stated quantities and chemical properties match the actual data in the epcra_tier2_data.xml file.
